name: Google Docs / Sheets / Slides
tagline: Free cloud office suite with real-time collaboration
best_for: Group projects, thesis collaboration, and anything needing real-time editing.
steps: Sign in with any free Google account
Click '+' to create a new document
Share with classmates via 'Share' button — they can edit in real time
notes: Best collaboration features of any free office suite. Auto-saves continuously. 15 GB of free Drive storage.
